name: Asihati Hazaiti
title: Software & Data Engineer
bio: Software and data engineer passionate about AI, robotics, and computational biology. Currently pursuing an MSc in Intelligent Adaptive Systems at the University of Hamburg — coursework spanning machine learning, computer vision, intelligent robotics, and biostatistics — while building cross-platform mobile apps with Angular and Ionic at Simplience GmbH. Previously spent three years as a consultant at ThoughtWorks China, leading and delivering projects across banking security (OAuth2, WebAuthn, ForgeRock), retail platform migration (VTEX, Azure), e-commerce testing, and a government portal serving millions. Trained in Apache Spark and big-data architectures on Databricks. BSc in Software Engineering from Nankai University. Polyglot in five languages, fluent in shipping software.
